items.name: ProductBridge
items.tagline: Agent that collects feedback across multiple platforms
items.description: Your feedback is everywhere — Slack threads, Intercom support tickets, review sites, DMs. ProductBridge's AI agent collects it all automatically, organizes it, deduplicates, and helps your team ship what users actually want. Users request features, upvote, and watch ideas move through your public roadmap. Teams prioritize with data, publish changelogs, and auto-notify users when their feature ships. One platform. Complete feedback loop. Flat pricing. No seat fees. No surprises. Ever.

items.name: AdsTurbo
items.tagline: Create ads with AI actors that look truly human
items.description: AdsTurbo AI creates UGC-style video ads using AI Talking Actors trained on real creators—so expressions, gestures, and delivery look natural instead of “obvious AI.” Generate on-camera performances fast, test more creatives, and scale ad production without losing the human feel that builds trust and drives conversions.

items.name: Composer 2 by Cursor
items.description: Composer 2 by Cursor is a frontier-level coding model built for complex, long-horizon development tasks. It combines strong benchmark performance with highly efficient pricing ($0.50/M input, $2.50/M output). Powered by continued pretraining and reinforcement learning, it delivers smarter code generation with better cost-performance, plus a faster variant for real-time workflows.

items.name: Assembly 2.0
items.tagline: Build modern client portals for service businesses
items.description: Your clients shouldn't need five logins to work with you. Assembly gives them one polished portal for everything—messages, payments, files, tasks, and more. Assembly 2.0 adds a new client home page editor with variants, folders that let you organize apps on your sidebar, recurring automations, a desktop app with real notifications, and more. Less admin, more time for actual client work. Built for creative and professional service firms.

items.name: GitAgent by Lyzr
items.description: Your AI agent's soul belongs in Git, not locked inside a framework. GitAgent is an open standard that extracts your agent's config, logic, tools, and memory into a portable, version-controlled definition. Define once. Run anywhere. Claude, OpenAI, CrewAI, OpenClaw, you name it. Same repo, any runtime. Roll back prompts like code. Branch, review, reproduce. #OwnYourAgent

items.name: Claude Code Channels
items.tagline: Push events and chat with Claude Code via Telegram & Discord
items.description: Claude Code Channels let you control your local coding session from anywhere. Using MCP servers, you can bridge Claude to Telegram and Discord to push events, receive alerts, and reply to your terminal assistant directly from your phone.

items.name: Google AI Studio 2.0
items.tagline: Full-stack vibe coding powered by Antigravity + Firebase
items.description: Google AI Studio just launched a new full-stack vibe coding experience powered by Antigravity. Turn simple prompts into production-ready apps with built-in Firebase (database + auth), multiplayer support, and a smarter agent that handles multi-step tasks and remembers your project. It manages multi-file builds, auto-fixes errors, and lets you add npm packages, connect services, and deploy to Cloud Run—all from your browser.

items.name: Built for Devs
items.tagline: See how developers really experience your product
items.description: Three tools. One platform. Complete developer adoption intelligence. Time-to-value tracking, screen-recorded evaluations with real ICP-matched devs, and an AI engine that tells you exactly what's broken and how to fix it. The intelligence compounds. You've watched the dashboards. Developers still drop off. Now you'll know why.

items.name: Visdiff
items.tagline: Stop bridging the design-to-code gap, close it
items.description: AI coding tools generate frontends that look close, but never match the design. You end up spending hours fixing spacing, fonts, colors, and layout. Design-to-code plugins generate rigid code. Visual regression tools catch problems but don't fix them. Visdiff closes the loop: paste your Figma link, and AI agents generate, verify, and fix the code against your design reference until it actually matches. No more "close enough." What you designed is what gets shipped.

items.name: AI Skills Manager
items.tagline: One place for all your AI skills
items.description: Browse, install, enable, and share AI agent skills across all major coding agents in one desktop app.

The app crashes regularly on iOS 17 and the developer hasn’t made any updates in quite some time. Would skip this app in favor of something more stable.
The app is the best I’ve seen for counting pushups. Really impressed.  I first downloaded the free one.  But when it was having problems I figured the paid one is probably free of those problems. But
The push up count is never correct. There is no way to take off from the counter when it double counts one push up. There is no way to create a plan for push ups. DON’T WASTE YOUR MONEY!
The app is the best I’ve seen for counting pushups. Really impressed.  I first downloaded the free one.  But when it was having problems I figured the paid one is probably free of those problems. But
App does not work after latest update. App opens but all data is lost. Nothing works now.
The data doesn’t save in the event you delete the app. I lost all of my data because I accidentally deleted the app.

Don’t even bother to waste your time taking up space on your phone.  The count is always wrong and by a lot.  I have the Pro version.  I’ll be deleting it.
I’m in my 60s and this app keeps me motivated to keep pushing weekly.
I have yet to do a set off push ups where it recorded every push up. An app that records how many sets you do in a workout is an amazing concept. If only it worked.
